competitions.title: EAST vs WEST 24 Predictions LIVE | Michael Todd & Lars Rørbakken
competitions.summary:
East vs West 24 is almost here, and tonight we're breaking down the entire card.

Joining me is Lars Rørbakken as we go match by match, discuss the biggest storylines, and give our predictions for every supermatch at East vs West 24.

Who wins?
Who gets upset?
Which matches are being overlooked?
And where does the main event picture go from here?

We'll be taking questions from the live chat throughout the stream.

If you're attending East vs West 24 in Little Rock get your tickets now at evwzports.com if you’re ordering the PPV, use code MMT at EVWSports.com.

#Armwrestling #EastVsWest24 #MichaelTodd #LarsRorbakken #EVW24

competitions.title: East vs West 24 MEGATHREAD
competitions.summary: This is the official megathread. All comments are set to display by newest . While the event is happening, make sure to keep the megathread open and constantly refreshed to view and and participate in live discussion from the reddit community. Event Time: June 6, 2026 12:00 PM Local Arkansas Time 1:00 PM EST Eastern Standard Time 10:00 AM PST Pacific Standard Time 5:00 PM UTC Coordinated Universal Time 7:00 PM CET Central European Time 9:00 PM GST Gulf Standard Time Purchase PPV : https://live.evwsports.com/ Preliminary Matches These matches will be livestreamed for free on YouTube: Courtney Huycke vs Nastasia Pastrokova Ryan Belanger vs Jason Merlo Auden Larratt vs Jeremy Parker Main Card Matches Buy the PPV to watch these matches (order of matches might change): Irakli Zirakashvili vs Yoshinobu Kanai Adam Wawrzynski vs Peter Čeleš Justin Bishop vs Danil Ustinov Craig Tullier vs Janis Amolins Corey West vs Pavlo Derbedyenyev Jerry Cadorette vs Kody Merritt Tobias Sporrong vs Alex Kurdecha Riekerd Bornman vs Alizhan Muratov Todd Hutchings vs Bogdan Stoica Ermes Gasparini vs Artyom Morozov Oleg Petrenko vs Michael Todd https://preview.redd.it/5s71jrq3td5h1.png?width=2000&format=png&auto=webp&s=23a0ff071e4921bafb74c8ce0f6344ebe30a9c02 submitted by /u/minhale [link] [comments]
